> **Spec first (Law 2).** New behavior requires a spec under `docs/specs/**` before any impl. Spec format: [`docs/guides/spec-format.md`](../../docs/guides/spec-format.md).

## Proposed spec path

`docs/specs/<system>/<file>.md`

## Proposed behavior

<!-- One-paragraph summary of what the spec will define -->

- Breaks existing API? yes / no

## Modularity check (Law 14)

- Which crate(s) own this behavior?
- Does this respect sacred module boundaries (Law 3)?
- Any new cross-system contract required? — `docs/contracts/<a>-<b>.md`
